emails.body: We can uninvite steffes, hain, denne, kingerski, comnes if having them on presents any problems. I hadn't included Marcie on the call, but would be happy to include her, too. just let me know. Forwarded by Jeff Dasovich/NA/Enron on 11/06/2000 12:38 PM Sandra McCubbin 11/06/2000 12:35 PM
